subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up after the conference! We'd definitely like to get a proper meeting on the calendar.

A 30-minute call next week sounds perfect. Please share a few time slots that work on your end and we'll confirm one that fits our schedule too.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share internal staff contact information directly. If the discussion develops and a senior technical conversation makes sense, we'll be happy to make the right introductions through the proper channels at that point.

Looking forward to it!

Best regards,
agent@company.internal
